summary: Frontend testing complete for 3D View Bug Fixes. All critical bugs verified as FIXED: Time display now shows correct format (7h 41m instead of 462h 25m), units respect user preference (mph/mi), street name shows road name instead of full instruction, and region/state indicator bar added to 3D bottom HUD.

minor_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing sprite images: 'road_', 'construction_pattern', 'running', 'post_office', 'courthouse', 'car_wash' - cosmetic only
Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

minor_issues.issue: Console warning: Style 'Streets Default v2' is deprecated - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX: formatTime function in Navigation3DView.tsx (line 94-99) now correctly handles seconds - divides by 3600 for hours, uses modulo for minutes
VERIFIED FIX: unitSystem prop added (line 24, 116) and used for speed/distance conversion (lines 299-306)
VERIFIED FIX: streetName prop (line 23) now receives currentRoad instead of full instruction text
VERIFIED FIX: currentRegion prop (line 25) and region strip added to bottom nav bar (lines 394-412)
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays Distance: 463.8 mi
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays ETA: 1:34 PM with LIVE indicator
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays Speed Limit: 35 mph
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays Current Speed: 0 MPH
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays Turn Banner: 0.2 mi + direction
VERIFIED: 3D view correctly displays Region/State: W BROADWAY. GO + IOWA
VERIFIED: 2D/3D mode switching works correctly without losing route
VERIFIED: 2D view arrival HUD still works correctly (regression check passed)

features_tested.guest_login: PASS - Click 'Continue as Guest', reaches dashboard
features_tested.navigation_view_loads: PASS - Map loads with user location marker visible
features_tested.route_calculation: PASS - Route to Chicago calculated (463.8 mi, 7h 41m)
features_tested.3d_mode_switch: PASS - Clicked 2D button to switch to 3D mode
features_tested.3d_distance_display: PASS - Shows '463.8 mi' with correct units
features_tested.3d_eta_display: PASS - Shows '1:34 PM' with LIVE indicator
features_tested.3d_speed_limit: PASS - Shows '35 mph' with correct units
features_tested.3d_turn_banner: PASS - Shows '0.2 mi' + direction at top
features_tested.2d_3d_switching: PASS - Route preserved after switching modes

bug_fixes_verified.time_display_bug: FIXED - formatTime now handles seconds correctly (3600s = 1h, not 60h)
bug_fixes_verified.hardcoded_units_bug: FIXED - Units now respect unitSystem prop
bug_fixes_verified.street_name_bug: FIXED - Shows road name instead of full instruction
bug_fixes_verified.region_indicator_bug: FIXED - Added region/state indicator bar to 3D bottom HUD

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-emblem-display.preview.emergentagent.com. All 3D view bug fixes verified working. Key data-testids for 3D view: 3d-turn-banner, 3d-stop-sign, 3d-speed-limit, 3d-current-speed, 3d-nav-bar, 3d-stat-dist, 3d-stat-time, 3d-stat-eta. The formatTime function in Navigation3DView.tsx now correctly handles seconds (line 94-99). IP geolocation fallback places user in Council Bluffs, Iowa.
